title: hieracium subramosum subsp. impressum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. impressum, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium subramosum subsp. impressum can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
